description: Create Room database layer (entities, DAOs, database class, repositories) and DataStore preferences for the app's persistent storage. This covers: birth profiles, jaap sessions, meditation sessions, and app preferences (dark mode, selected profile).
steps: Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/entities/ProfileEntity.kt - Room entity with fields: id (auto-gen), name, dateOfBirth, birthTime, birthPlace, latitude, longitude, gender, createdAt. Include type converters if needed.

Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/entities/JaapSessionEntity.kt - Room entity with fields: id (auto-gen), profileId, mantraName, mantraText, targetCount, completedCount, malas (count/108), startTime, endTime, date.

Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/entities/MeditationSessionEntity.kt - Room entity with fields: id (auto-gen), profileId, durationMinutes, type (e.g. 'silent', 'mantra', 'breath'), startTime, endTime, date, completed (boolean).
Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/dao/ProfileDao.kt - DAO interface with: insert, update, delete, getAll (Flow), getById, getCount.
Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/dao/JaapDao.kt - DAO interface with: insert, getByProfileId (Flow), getAll (Flow), getTotalCountByMantra, getSessionsForDate.

Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/dao/MeditationDao.kt - DAO interface with: insert, getByProfileId (Flow), getAll (Flow), getStreakDays (consecutive days with sessions), getSessionsForDateRange.
Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/AppDatabase.kt - Room database class with all 3 entities, version 1, export schema false.
Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/repository/ProfileRepository.kt - repository class wrapping ProfileDao with suspend functions.
Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/repository/SadhanaRepository.kt - repository class wrapping JaapDao and MeditationDao.

Create android/app/src/main/java/com/jainkundali/app/data/preferences/AppPreferences.kt - DataStore preferences manager with: isDarkMode (Boolean), selectedProfileId (Long?), lastOpenedScreen (String).
acceptance_criteria: Three Room entities are defined with proper @Entity, @PrimaryKey, @ColumnInfo annotations
Three DAO interfaces have @Insert, @Query, @Delete, @Update annotations with correct SQL
AppDatabase class extends RoomDatabase and declares all entities
Repositories provide clean suspend fun and Flow-based APIs
DataStore preferences handle dark mode toggle and profile selection
All DAOs return Flow for observable queries
verification: Read all Room files and verify annotations and SQL queries are syntactically correct
Verify database version and entity registration
Verify DataStore key definitions are correct
findings: All 10 data layer files created successfully. Room dependencies and KSP already configured in build.gradle.kts. minSdk=26 allows use of java.time without desugaring. Cannot run Gradle build locally due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode, but code follows standard Room/DataStore patterns and should compile correctly in CI.
